rationale: Educ. Code §7.012 governs model data-sharing agreements among education and workforce agencies. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b).
quote: The agency, the Texas Higher Education Coordinating Board, and the Texas Workforce Commission jointly shall develop and make available the following model data-sharing agreements
_note: No conflict. The rule text addresses FERPA data-sharing agreements and is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
